postReview.title: Mexico 2-1 Panama: Late Jimenez penalty seals Nations League trophy
postReview.description: Raul Jimenez was the hero for Mexico, scoring twice to lead them to their first CONCACAF Nations League title with a win over Panama.

QAData.question: Who won between Mexico and Panama on Mon, 24 Mar 2025 01:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Mexico won 2–1 over Panama on Mon, 24 Mar 2025 01:30:00 GMT.
